programme.desc: Texas police investigating the stabbing death of a mother uncover a bizarre scene: poisoned pudding, cell phones submerged in water and a bathtub rigged for electrocution. In the end, a disturbing plan is revealed, driven by a young love gone wrong.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After saving a State University Alumni ribbon cutting ceremony, Ben becomes the guest of honor at the upcoming Gala, but when the cirque entertainment turns out to be Zombozo-in-disguise, Ben must not only defeat the evil clown but his mysterious new sidekick: Pirouette!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a drag race, Ben hopes to stay neck and neck with Vin Ethanol and La Grange as XLR8, but when his watch keeps shorting out, our hero must get creative if he is to keep up with his fast and furious foes!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After stuffing their faces with gyros, Team Tennyson makes their way to the real Greece in the Omni-Copter, but when they are suddenly captured by the Forever Knight mid-flight, Ben ends up in a coliseum, where he is pit against old foes: Iron Kyle, Queen Bee, and the Ground Hawgs!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After receiving a super-exclusive ticket to Adrenaland, Ben leaves behind Grandpa Max and Gwen to enjoy the perks of being the parks only attendant, but when he learns he's not alone, our hero must now contend with the only kid who could afford the price of admission: Billy Billions!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: While taking in the sights and sounds of a Rio de Jenaro music festival, Ben bristles at Gwen's suggestion that she be his new sidekick, but when the festival is threaten by the supersonic sound waves of Lord Decibel, our hero must lean on help from some familiar faces: DJ Gpa and Gwen-Cat!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a visit to the farm of Penny Bennyson's grandfather, Team Tennyson is constantly haunted by a Scare-Crow that's come to life, our hero must defeat Aristocrow's master.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson travels to Wheeler, 'the liveliest mining town on Route 66', but when Ben becomes paranoid that the Forever Knight is out to get him, he must try to convince his fam while also stopping his new foe from destroying the town.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When a new Xingo app mysteriously appears on Gwen's tablet, Ben can't help himself and activates it despite his cousin's disapproval, springing a trap that transports Ben in the animated world and Xingo back in the real world. It's the ol' switcheroo!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen can't wait for the Omni-Copter to arrive at the Great Pyramids, but when bad weather disrupts their flight, they soon come face-to-face with The Fogg and its spawn: The Fogg Family!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Forever Knight, with an over-clocked Time Machine in his grasp and a group of super- baddies by his side, is close to conquering all of history, but a certain hero with a team of 10 aliens on his side has other plans-- foiling Forever Knight at every twist and turn in time!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Forever Knight finally assembles his Round Table of young but super-powerful Knights, including-- Ben?! With Ben's help, Forever Knight leads his new minions in an all-out attack on a Particle Accelerator - his true intention to transform it into a Time Machine and conquer history!

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Half dog, half man, Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve...as long as he isn’t distracted by squirrels.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: When a new professor's methods leave Hogwarts unprepared to fight the rising tide of evil, Harry teaches students how to defend against the dark arts.

programme.title: Rugrats In Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Chuckie and the entire gang go to Paris with the hope of finding a new mom for his dad in this Rugrats film.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life – to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Follow the minion trio as they venture out into the world to find a new evil boss for their brethren to follow.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter returns to Hogwarts for his sixth year - to face a growing danger that may be more than a match for his strengthening powers as a wizard.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Edipan is a magical holiday in which all creatures of magic take a break. No magic, good or bad.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old 'good witch' comes to Orchid Bay, she manages to do a better job at fighting evil than June.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Monroe's fun-loving dad, William, comes to visit and criticizes how his son does his job as advisor to the Te Xuan Ze.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Every three years, magical creatures from all over the world come together for the Convergence.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: Ray-Ray tests a growth potion to make himself bigger, but he becomes a gigantic monster.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: Monster parents asks for June's help when their kids turn into humans beings for Halloween and stay that way.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: June tries to rescue a group of magical beings who have been turned into animals and imprisoned by an evil zookeeper.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: A demoness creates clones of June and her friends in order to release an evil ruler from banishment.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: June becomes the reluctant star of her own reality television show.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: A demon traps June's friends and family inside a snow globe during Jody's sister's Bat Mitzvah.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: A magic spell brings Ray-Ray's comic book hero and his evil nemesis to life.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: Ah-Mah tells Ray-Ray the story of how June became the Te Xuan Ze.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: When she needs to be in two places at once, June tries to create a body double, but things go terribly wrong.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: June goes in search of a mysterious creature that is terrifying the entire magical community.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical S1
programme.desc: Alex is torn between her daughter’s school play and an “all-hands” situation in the Emergency Department.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical S1
programme.desc: Joyce’s belief that personal life should stay out of the workplace is tested by unexpected news. Ron thinks a patient has a crush on him.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical S1
programme.desc: When Ron hexes the day to prove superstitions aren’t real, things at the hospital start getting weird. Joyce and Matt discover an employee’s secret.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S2
programme.desc: In this animated series, actor Will Smith voices Pinocchio and the predicaments he faces in order to become a real boy.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S2
programme.desc: Given a South American twist, this animated tale tells the story of Thumbelina, who despite her size, sets out to make a difference in other people's lives.

programme.title: Rugrats In Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Chuckie and the entire gang go to Paris with the hope of finding a new mom for his dad in this Rugrats film.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: A wish about trust causes a serious trust issue between Daniel and Ruby, too. Meanwhile, Daniel learns secrets about his dad that he never knew.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: Daniel struggles to understand his daughter’s new vocation. Ruby embarks on a scientific wish that helps bring them both to a meeting of the minds.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: Ruby helps bring a long-kept secret to light and changes a life. Daniel meets a business developer interested in Emerald whom he tries to win over.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Maverick joins forces with a lady gambler to enter a Winner-Takes-All poker game.

programme.title: The Good Liar
programme.desc: A career con man sets his sights on his latest mark – a recently widowed woman, worth millions. But as the two draw closer, what should have been another simple swindle takes on the ultimate stakes.

programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu is in India for the first time in his life and wants to discover as much food as he can handle. From an Idli making lesson to a workout in the flower markets of Kolkata. Will he make it to Hong Kong on time and in one piece?

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren commences his second Food Trail of South Africa in the world famous Kruger National Park and surrounds.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Johannesburg - the gateway city to exploring South Africa! In this episode Warren indulges in the vibrant international flavours and surrounds of the Sandton neighbourhood, loved by locals and visitors alike.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: As Manu heads past his halfway mark on his journey around the world, he heads to Tokyo to explore the bustling city. It is a massive challenge and he is having the time of his life but how is that budget going?

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore animal communication and reveal the incredible adaptations that enable animals to ‘talk’ to each other.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Examining nature’s most sociable animals, unveiling the surprising and incredible behaviours that have evolved in response to cohabitation.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Showcasing some of nature’s most incredible animal minds, whose brains demonstrate high intelligence, enabling them to gain advantage of their competition.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: Meet some late-life lovers and explore the reasons behind their sexual longevity and their ability to reproduce well into their later years.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how ad campaigns from the '50s launched new American traditions and the promise of a bright tomorrow.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how stricter rules and public mistrust inspired 1970s advertisers to create some of history's greatest campaigns.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Tag and Scooch’s first day of Race Cadets and Sam Whippet tells the Cadets that whoever can catch him in a race will be the new team captain. \ When Mom donates a box of Tag’s old toys to the new daycare center, Tag decides that the only way to get her box of toys back is to go around town collecting toys to swap out for her toys.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Beans is nervous that Frank is starting to make a new best friend, so Beans enlists Tag to help him win Frank back. \ Grandpaw and Grandmaw tell Tag the story of the early days of Pawston. programme.title: The Adventures Of Rocky And Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Adventures Of Rocky And Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Adventures Of Rocky And Bullwinkle
programme.desc: When Bullwinkle remembers he forgot the secret ingredient to his stinky pie recipe, he and Rocky travel to Norway and enlist the help of his beloved Grandwinkle, not knowing that they are being followed!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Rocky And Bullwinkle

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the Dews find out their glitter guide (an older Dew Drop) is coming to visit, they bend over backwards to make a great first impression, but end up forgetting some of their responsiblities in the process. / When a string breaks on Marcus’ piano before his recital and he can’t practice, the Dews must lead Marcus to a new piano.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the Dew Drops have the day off, they discover their families still need their help when they’re not around. / Harper needs a good night’s sleep before her first day of Cooking Camp. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch pretend to be their favorite comic book heroes and help the dogs of Pawston. programme.title: How Do Animals Do That? (S1)

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S5)

programme.title: The Aquarium (S1)
programme.desc: Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two wobbegong sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Meteor Part 1
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: Final Approach Part 1
programme.desc: An action filled account of an Ex FBI negotiator who uses all his skills to save a jumbo jet headed for Los Angeles California from the terrorists who have placed a bomb on board.

programme.title: Final Approach Part 2
programme.desc: An action filled account of an Ex FBI negotiator who uses all his skills to save a jumbo jet headed for Los Angeles California from the terrorists who have placed a bomb on board.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante’s Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Hit the Top
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Docu Insight
programme.desc: Docu Insight

programme.title: Got The Spot
programme.desc: This program highlights locations that are truly exceptional, blending traditional elements with modern trends. Through the eyes of foreign influencers who thrive on social media, we aim to showcase the unique charm of different regions and generate a wealth of engaging content in this groundbreaking travel initiative!

programme.title: Hwarang: The Poet Warrior Youth
programme.desc: Not many people these days know about Hwarang in depth. How did these young men become central to unifying old Korea's Three Kingdoms? Imagine how life must have been for Silla Hwarang in the 6th century.

programme.title: Round Playlist
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: Hometown Heroes : Baseball
programme.desc: Four legendary Korean professional baseball players take on a new challenge as coaches of U-10 youth baseball teams. They may be masters of the game, but as coaches, they are complete rookies starting from zero. As each legend leads a team representing his former club's home region, a fierce battle for local pride begins.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: Immortal Songs
programme.desc: Legendary artists and rising performers come together, connecting generations through music. Korea's top vocalists reinterpret iconic songs in their own styles, delivering powerful and emotional performances. Don't miss this unforgettable musical competition.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: Live and Die in East LA
programme.desc: After treating a boy injured in a hit-and-run, ER doctor Attila is drawn into East L.A.’s underworld conflict. The boy is the son of a crime lord, and the “accident” was gang revenge. To save his sister from prison, Attila becomes a drug courier, igniting a gang war that forces a tragic choice.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join award-winning Malaysian actress Siti Saleha and her husband as they explore the city by day and venture into the night, discovering its vibrant culture and hidden treasures.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Live and Die in East LA
programme.desc: After treating a boy injured in a hit-and-run, ER doctor Attila is drawn into East L.A.’s underworld conflict. The boy is the son of a crime lord, and the “accident” was gang revenge. To save his sister from prison, Attila becomes a drug courier, igniting a gang war that forces a tragic choice.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine

However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek takes Chauncy to see a house in the super desirable North Dallas neighborhood. Even though this smaller home has foundation issues, Derek feels it's too much of a deal to pass on.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: With Gordon Ramsay’s reputation on the line, the top six chefs face the ultimate challenge of taking over the world's largest Hell's Kitchen restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining five home cooks take on two rounds of challenges that determine who will move on to the Finals.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The final three home cooks take on their last challenge in the MasterChef kitchen in front of a live audience. Each chef has to whip up a spectacular three-course meal.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Judges Gordon Ramsay, Aarón Sánchez and Joe Bastianich crown the next MasterChef champion and the winner of $250,000.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining without wi-fi facilities might be too much for some people, but anyone wanting to unleash their wild side should join host Michael Yo for a journey to some far-out eating places.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining al-fresco hits new levels as host Michael Yo takes us on a tour of truly unique outdoor dining experiences - like noshing on Kampung-style food while seated in the middle of a river.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Jeana has huge, spherical growths dangling from her ears and the embarrassment is ruining her life. Dr. Lee shows Dr. Lyndsay how to avoid the “Danger Triangle” while removing Craig’s scary neck lump.

programme.title: A Boyfriend To Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing. Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee in helping Ryan, whose numerous head bumps undermine his life journey.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Lance's notoriously big bump, which halted his rap dreams. Shelby has lost control of her sweet tooth, her health and the mystery bumps she has developed.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: Throughout civilisation there are many mighty empires that have risen, only to one day fall. And for some of them, their demise remains a mystery. What can we discover from clues left behind by them?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: Tokyo Legacy
programme.desc: The history of Tokyo, from its devastated state in the aftermath of WWII, rapid development leading to the 1964 Olympics, and finally the global powerhouse on the road to the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: After the team conducts a simultaneous drone swarm experiment in order to stimulate phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch, they encounter more than what they bargained for.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: Throughout civilisation there are many mighty empires that have risen, only to one day fall. And for some of them, their demise remains a mystery. What can we discover from clues left behind by them?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Crashed UFOs. Recovered alien entities. For decades, incredible claims have been made about an extraterrestrial presence on Earth—and the government has gone to great lengths to discredit them.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A German-American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos in the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: On Chicago's North Side, Mike and Jersey get VIP access to a sprawling historic home that features four floors of dazzling high-end antique toys. It's an eye-popping, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From explosions that eviscerate entire forests, to lakes that explode with lethal gas, to earthquakes that could have been triggered by humans, are some of Earth’s deadliest catastrophes truly unnatural?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As gator season enters the homestretch, Troy and Pickle chase a hook-breaking monster. Ashley uses a tip from the King of the Swamp to target a giant. Bruce puts it all on the line on his final day.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The Fellowship believes more than ever that they are finally zeroing in on treasure when they discover Oak Logs which may be part of the legendary platforms leading them to the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team dives in search of an A3 Skywarrior attack aircraft that was lost in a suspicious disaster off the USS Saratoga aircraft carrier in 1960. The Saratoga lost eight men on this single mission.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: On Chicago's North Side, Mike and Jersey get VIP access to a sprawling historic home that features four floors of dazzling high-end antique toys. It's an eye-popping, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Table for Six 2
programme.desc: The sequel to "Table for Six", Bernard and Lung plan to get married while their eldest brother is away. Yet, the weddings spiral into a chaotic battleground with escalating family drama, creating a messy affair for everyone involved.

programme.title: Pass and Goal
programme.desc: After losing everything, a businesswoman starts over in Sham Shui Po, forming a kids’ football team to take on an elite squad. As she rebuilds her life, she inspires her players to believe in themselves and fight against the odds. Together, they strive to rewrite their first half with a second chance at victory and hope.

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Come Back Home
programme.desc: In a chilly winter, De and his family goes on a self-drive tour to Changbai Mountain. The holiday turns tragic when De’s eight-year-old son goes missing. He seeks help from the local police but is unable to find his son. Though the golden hour has passed, De and the rescue team insist on continuing the search. Can they finally rescue the boy?

programme.title: Kung Fu Jungle
programme.desc: A vicious killer goes around challenging and killing top martial arts masters. When convicted killer and kung fu expert Ha Hou Mo hears of this, he offers to help the police capture the killer in exchange for his freedom. Can he really help?

programme.title: Band Four
programme.desc: An aspiring singer of an indie band called Band Four reunites with her estranged guitarist father following the death of her mother. Together with her half-sister and her nine-year-old son, the newly reunited family come together to support each other through their love and passion for music.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: Endgame
programme.desc: A killer and a stage actor accidentally swapped their identities at a bathhouse. The actor must complete the killer’s mission while the killer thinks he is a hopeless actor after losing his memory during the accident. When the killer strives to become a successful stage actor, he also starts to recall what has happened…

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Qing enforcer Luo Yi Hu murders rebel Chen Gui, forcing his wife and daughter Xiao Wei to flee to Guang Long Town. There, mischievous Jia Yu discovers his master’s identity as a rebel while helping Xiao Wei. After his loved ones and mentor are killed, Jia Yu sheds his playful ways and seeks vengeance, facing the Qing forces in a final battle.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: The Assassin
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Nieh Cheng has retired into hiding. However, when Premier Yen's family is massacred, he seeks out the reclusive swordsman and coaxes him into a final revenge mission in this epic story set in the Six Kingdom era.

programme.title: NHK World TV Special Program
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: On the islands and coast of the Yamaguchi end of the Seto Inland Sea, we experience a warm welcome in these hard-working small communities, poor in amenities but rich in happiness and human kindness.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Parody. In an era of overwhelming, and often fake, information, parody dissects its subject through humor, and breathes new value into the familiar. Explore design through parody.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: Take Tech

programme.title: Friends S7 3
programme.desc: Monica becomes obsessed with acquiring Phoebe's secret, delicious cookie recipe. Joey accepts Rachel's help with sailing. Chandler fails to impress Monica's father.

programme.title: Friends S7 4
programme.desc: Rachel wants to hire a cute, young male assistant over a more qualified woman. Joey's show gets cancelled. Chandler, Monica and Ross tell embarrassing secrets about one another.

programme.title: Friends S7 5
programme.desc: Joey tries to teach Chandler how to smile for an engagement picture with Monica. Phoebe and Ross each date the members of a couple preparing for divorce. Joey takes Tag out for a good time.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 23
programme.desc: A horrible day at work prompts Penny to evaluate her life choices - including her relationship with Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 24
programme.desc: With his entire world changing around him, Sheldon is forced to confront an uncertain future and considers a major move in the seventh season finale.

programme.title: Dial M For Murder
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Grace Kelly and Ray Milland star with Robert Cummings in one of Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers--Dial M for Murder. When playboy tennis pro Tony Wendice (Milland--The Lost Weekend) discovers his rich wife, Margot (Kelly--Rear Window, To Catch a Thief), is having an affair with handsome American Mark Hallidy (Cummings--The Carpetbaggers), he devises an ingenious plot to murder her. But when his scheme takes an unexpected, deadly twist, Tony improvises--implicating Margot for first degree murder in this classic spellbinder.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 1
programme.desc: On the eighth season premiere, Leonard and Amy take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny interviews for a job at Bernadette's company.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 2
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to teach a class, Howard surprises everyone by taking it. Meanwhile, the tension between Penny and Bernadette gives Amy a chance to play both sides.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 3
programme.desc: Howard's nervous when NASA asks him to throw out the first pitch at a game. Also, Leonard & Penny try to prove Sheldon wrong after he claims that he & Amy are a superior couple.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: In a universe as vast as it is mysterious, a small but powerful force has existed for centuries. Protectors of peace and justice, they are called the Green Lantern Corps.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop goes on a 24-hour training course with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

programme.title: The New World
programme.desc: The story of the English exploration of Virginia, and of the changing world and loves of Pocahontas.

programme.title: Joker (2019)
programme.desc: Joker centers around an origin of the iconic arch nemesis and is an original, standalone story not seen before on the big screen. Todd Phillips' exploration of Arthur Fleck (Joaquin Phoenix), a man disregarded by society is not only a gritty character study, but also a broader cautionary tale.

programme.title: Titans S1 1
programme.desc: Rachel Roth, a teen haunted by dark visions and powers, falls under the wing of Det. Dick Grayson.

programme.title: Titans S1 2
programme.desc: In search of a safe haven for Rachel, Dick arrives on the doorstep of vigilante heroes Hawk and Dove.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 07
programme.desc: Michael and his fellow employees debate the authenticity of a giant lizard and find a game with a very specific target audience. Then at the diner, he adds some spice to lunch time and gives patrons the chills while demonstrating a new way to cool soup. Finally at the furniture store, Michael shows his coworker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 08
programme.desc: In this special crossover event, the Impractical Jokers help Michael stun coffee bar customers - but soon discover the joke is on them! Plus, Michael's woodland creatures display fantastic hidden abilities.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 09
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago to hash out new ideas in a hemp store, but it's not until he inspects a spooky church that people start getting stoned, literally. Plus, Michael teams up with special guest star, Jack Black!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 10
programme.desc: Michael shows some unsuspecting shoppers how to manipulate solid objects, and he reveals the truth behind how automatic vacuums work. Plus, one employee's shift at a camping store becomes very colorful - and confusing.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 11
programme.desc: At Michael's fireworks stand, he's got everything from exploding fruit to levitation sparklers. And at a Hemp store, Michael shows off his innovations in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule completely blows one man's mind!

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 4
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to score a locker packed with rare movie memorabilia. Then, Papa Bear and T-Money each scoop up low-grade bins, but when they each start to sift through their individual messes, one of them finds a childhood dream-come-true. Andlater, the day's final auction sparks an intense bidding war, but when one of our buyers shoots the moon on his bid, it leaves everyone else wondering exactly where all of this cash is coming from.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 5
programme.desc: Our buyers lock horns to win a unit packed with valuable construction equipment. Then, Brandon and Lori spot something that no one else does, but they'll have to play it cool if they want to walk away with this golden score. And later, the day's final locker smells of gas and cash, but leads to a showdown that gets one of our buyers banned from the auction.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Jesse lock horns in a do or die bidding war. One of them spies an authentic treasure hidden amongst the contents, but only one will walk away with the score. And later, a newbie steals a prize unit out from under our regulars and proves that she's here to play. Then, Brandon and Lori unearth a five-alarm find. If it works, they could be looking at a $20,000 pay day on this item alone.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 8
programme.desc: Our buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits? Then, a dumpy unit sends almost everyone running, but Papa Bear spies a profit. And later, the day's final auction contains expensive looking sky-diving equipment that ignites a sky-high bidding war. But when the dust settles, the winner will unveil a hidden gem that spells a five-figure payday.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 04
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of Hide-and-Sneak, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 05
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.desc: Terra Nullius: law or lie? Eddie Mabo and others challenge the legal fiction at the heart of colonisation and transform Australia's understanding of land and sovereignty.

programme.title: The World This Week
programme.desc: Manny Tsigas brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: First Generation
programme.desc: First Generation follows nine inspiring people from the Asia-Pacific who built new lives and forged their own path. Their stories celebrate ambition, belonging, and the diverse spirit that defines modern Australia.

programme.title: Asia News Week
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Ambulance Australia follows the state's Ambulance Services from the Triple Zero Control Centres to paramedics on the road.

programme.title: Winhanganha
programme.desc: WINHANGANHA is a journey of archival footage, sound, poetry and original composition examining how legacies of collection affect First Nations people and wider Australia. Told through the lens of Wiradjuri artist, Jazz Money.

programme.title: Great Australian Road Trips
programme.desc: Four high-profile Australian stars embark on an epic road trip across the country's most iconic landscapes, one unforgettable pit-stop at a time. With Melissa Leong, Nazeem Hussain, Claudia Karvan and Steph Tisdell.

programme.title: The World This Week
programme.desc: Manny Tsigas brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: On the brink of death in India, Bharat Sundaresan turned to cricket, gathering millions of followers. But it's now in Australia that the colourful commentator has found true acceptance.

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: Legendary commentator Jim Maxwell counts down his top six Ashes moments from his more than 50-year career. In third spot, he and Corbin Middlemas revisit Allan Border and Jeff Thompson's almost miracle at the MCG in 1982.

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: Jim Maxwell looks back on his favourite Ashes moments from his time following the game. In 4th spot, Jim and Corbin Middlemas reflect on Ben Stokes' masterful innings in 2019 that secured England a famous win at Headingley.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your Sunday. Johanna Nicholson and Lorna Dunkley bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Insiders
programme.desc: For 25 years Insiders has been the premier destination for political news, analysis and discussion. Patricia Karvelas and a panel of leading commentators cut through the noise with questions and analysis on the week's issues.

programme.title: Offsiders
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel discuss the week in sport including the FIFA World Cup Semi Finals, the Wallabies take on France, AFL, NRL, NRLW, the final week of Wimbledon, and the leadup to the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Back Roads
programme.desc: Back Roads travels to Gayndah, Queensland's oldest town, where citrus is the lifeblood of the community.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: The World This Week
programme.desc: Manny Tsigas brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Captivating audiences of all ages, this timeless story follows the unforgettable journey of a lost alien and the 10-year-old boy he befriends.

programme.title: From here to Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: In the second chapter of the Matrix trilogy, Zion falls under siege to the Machine Army. Neo and Trinity choose to return to the Matrix with Morpheus, unleashing their arsenal against the forces of repression and exploitation. Now, Neo must follow the course he has chosen if he is to save humanity from the dark fate that haunts his dreams.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A home invasion results in a man being beaten to death and set on fire. As investigators race to find the perpetrator, a shocking 911 call pits two brothers against each other in the interrogation room.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: In an affluent Washington town, a teenage heartbreak spirals into obsession, culminating in a deadly house-party shooting that exposes how jealousy can turn lethal.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner’s doorstep; a jeweller locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man dressed as a chicken claims to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Bob spent a fabulous career as a successful artist painting and drawing for department store advertising, where his work caught the attention of many celebrities.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Holiday spirit all but disappears from Marietta, Georgia, when one of its most festive residents is found murdered in his own home.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Linda grew up in luxury, her parents' Miami mansion meticulously maintained by staff. As a young woman, she worked in high-end real estate and enjoyed the Miami social scene.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: After suffering traumatic losses, Linda's life took a drastic turn. Now, at 70, her once-elegant lifestyle has evolved into an existence surrounded by trash and decay.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village—showing the risks of policing Alaska’s wild terrain.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop in New Mexico, an officer’s radio falls silent, triggering a frantic manhunt caught entirely on body cam.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Chef Philip Rolph was besotted with waitress Georgina Henshaw. But Phil realised she was using him for his money, and Georgina bragged to a friend that she was planning to kill him.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.
